\tzpentry{ID3299}{Magnetic Helicity Relation}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID3299 introduces Magnetic Helicity Relation as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\begin{equation} \mathcal{M} = \underbrace{ \text{SO}(3)}_{ \text{rotation}} \times \underbrace{ \mathbb{R}^3}_{ \text{position}} \times \underbrace{ \mathfrak{so}(3)^*}_{ \text{ang. momentum}} \times \underbrace{ \mathbb{R}^3}_{ \text{mag. moment}} \times \underbrace{C^ \infty(S^2, \mathbb{R}^3)}_{ \text{boundary fields}} \end{equation}
